cold_import/synthetic_tar/*.reason: The synthetic cold-import fixture now uses a high-directory topology with links, so old flat-fixture history is not comparable.

cold_tti/sequential/tti_ms.reason: Warm spore run --image TTI ceiling for the prewarmed nightly image path.

cold_import/synthetic_tar/elapsed_ms.reason: Synthetic rootfs import wall-clock ceiling for the deterministic nightly tar fixture.

warm_spore_tti/sequential/tti_ms.reason: Warm run from a forked spore directory should remain comfortably sub-second.

warm_spore_tti/sequential_fork/fork_ms_p.reason: Warm fork fan-out latency ceiling for the nightly sequential profile.
